race.description: Sunset Soiree 20 March Qtis 3yo Maiden Plate
race.comment: WEEKEND SPIRIT (8) has hit the frame at the past couple of outings including finishing runner-up over this track and trip two back. Maloney sticks in the saddle following that last-start placing and can improve enough to take this out. LOS ALAMITOS (5) lost the rider when facing the starter for the first time before hitting the frame at his past three efforts. Ready to peak now and has to be included. I AM LOUIE (4) wasn't too far away at Eagle Farm on debut and will have derived a stack of benefit from that race day experience. In the mix. OUTTA REEF (16) was safely held on debut last start, finishing fifth at Ipswich over 1350m. Down nicely in the weights this time as she stretches out in trip and worth including in exotics.
